## Points for the article

No  n8n limitation of 1 day hostory, Git will maintain unlimited versions

Proper comment based on the change will help to get back to the correct change. (AI used)

Periodic Backup or Where there is a change in the workflow

## Backup to Drive

### Safe Delete Branch

✅ Only deletes if n8n returned >0 workflows
✅ Aborts if either list is empty
✅ Skips if nothing to delete
